name: NOC
narrativeHook: The Network Operations Centre occupies the entire floor — banks of monitors showing traffic flows, uptime dashboards, and alert panels. But behind a door marked 'Environmental Controls', there's a second NOC that nobody talks about.
storyArc: The agent discovers a hidden second NOC behind the 'Environmental Controls' door. This shadow NOC monitors 12 classified network segments — the operational backbone of all four conspiracy threads. The Nightfall kill-switch dashboard is visible: three panels labelled 'Banking Grid', 'Telecom Network', and 'Energy Grid', each with a master switch and an estimated impact counter showing 40 million affected citizens. This is the first time the agent sees the full scale of Operation Nightfall. The Act I finale — everything learned on floors 1-9 converges here. Sgt Asante provides brief physical cover while the agent photographs the dashboard.

characters.role: Sarah Lin provided the access credentials from floor 9. Not present.
Sgt Asante provides brief cover — distracts the guard rotation for 90 seconds.
Dragunov's authorisation appears on the Nightfall dashboard as the activation authority.
Omar Hassan — his login is active on the shadow NOC workstation.

objectives.description: Discover the second NOC behind 'Environmental Controls' — a shadow operations centre monitoring classified network segments.
Identify the 12 classified network segments monitored from the shadow NOC — mapping to all four conspiracy operations.
Document the Nightfall kill-switch dashboard: three panels (Banking, Telecom, Energy), master switches, 40 million affected — the full scale of the threat.

elevatorKey.description: Photographing the Nightfall dashboard provides the evidence needed to justify ascending to the Corporate zone. The kill-switch activation codes visible on screen serve as the elevator key to Act II.

documentSpecs.description: Shadow NOC dashboard captures. Panel 1: 'NIGHTFALL — BANKING GRID — Status: ARMED — Targets: 847 institutions — Impact: 22M accounts'. Panel 2: 'NIGHTFALL — TELECOM — Status: ARMED — Targets: 12 carriers — Impact: 31M subscribers'. Panel 3: 'NIGHTFALL — ENERGY — Status: ARMED — Targets: 6 grid regions — Impact: 14M households'. Combined unique impact: ~40M citizens.

Network segment registry showing 12 classified segments: 3 Nightfall (banking/telecom/energy), 3 Prometheus (training/deployment/monitoring), 3 Leviathan (trading/routing/collection), 3 Apex (C2/archive/Genesis).
Nightfall activation protocol — requires dual authorisation: CSO (Dragunov) + designated activator. 30-second countdown. No abort after 15 seconds.
Shadow NOC access logs — only 5 individuals have ever entered: Omar Hassan, Dragunov, Dr Tanaka, Capt Volkov, and an unnamed 'ARCH-001' (The Architect).
Shadow NOC internal camera transcripts. Omar reviewing segments: 'Prometheus sync at 94%. Nightfall heartbeat nominal. Leviathan variance within tolerance.' Dragunov entering: 'Status report. Now.'
Omar's classified inbox — communications about segment health, capacity planning for the hidden network, requests from Dragunov for activation readiness reports.
Standard NOC monitoring data — internet bandwidth, VPN tunnel status, DNS query rates, CDN performance, standard application health checks.
Routine network incidents — cable faults, switch failures, capacity alerts, patching schedules, vendor maintenance windows.
